description: A customer who configured SSO themselves reports it is not working.

nodes.task_description: Review the SSO configuration settings the customer entered into the system.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant has access to the customer's current settings.

nodes.task_description: Compare the customer's settings against the metadata from their Identity Provider.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant finds a typo in the 'Entity ID' field.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of the typo and have them correct it.

expected_outcome.value: The customer corrects the typo, and SSO begins working.
